data.body: 524 (3b4e delete/init STALE tests) MERGED, but 3b4e verifier wants CONTENDED-lock ride-out per path too (AC: 'stale reclaimed AND contended ridden out'). Added contended tests (delete + init._git, fresh-lock + timer-release mid-backoff, mirror event_append pattern), pushed Gerrit 526. 525 (406f pipeline test) rebased onto current main (post-524). FINAL 2: 525->close 406f(#8), 526->close 3b4e. 9/10 bugs closed; #8 pending 525.
